title: SOL 2pk Heavy Duty Padlocks with Keys – 40mm Outdoor Security Locks with Hardened Steel Shackles – Weather-Resistant Design – Ideal for Shed, Fence, Gate, Toolbox, Storage or Garage Use
features: Durable Security for Outdoor Use – This heavy duty padlock outdoor weatherproof design is built to provide strong protection for gates, sheds, and more. Its robust construction makes it ideal as a padlock outdoor solution in all weather conditions.

Resistant to Weather and Corrosion – Made with rust-resistant materials, this weatherproof padlock helps maintain reliable performance over time. Suitable for wet and humid environments, it’s a practical choice among waterproof padlocks outdoor.

Strong and Tamper-Resistant Build – Designed with a hardened steel shackle, this pad lock offers solid protection against cutting and forced entry. It’s an effective option when dependable pad locks outside heavy duty security is needed.

Ideal for Sheds and Outdoor Storage – Keep garden tools and equipment secure with this dependable solution for locks for sheds. Its tough, weather-resistant design also makes it suitable as shed locks for garages and outdoor storage boxes.

Engineered for Harsh Outdoor Conditions – Built to handle the elements, this outdoor padlock weatherproof unit offers consistent performance in rain, snow, and sun. A reliable option for gates, sheds, and fences, this outdoor padlock helps keep your property secure.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Lock Series: Padlocks for Every Security Need. 2 Heavy Duty Padlocks Add To Basket Digit Combination Padlock Buying Options Cable Bike Lock with Key Add To Basket Cable Bike Lock (Blue) Buying Options 40mm Weatherproof Padlock Buying Options Customer Reviews 3.9 out of 5 stars 2,020 4.4 out of 5 stars 336 4.2 out of 5 stars 330 4.2 out of 5 stars 330 4.0 out of 5 stars 188 Price £5.79 £ 5 . 79 — £3.99 £ 3 . 99 — — Durable ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Heavy Duty ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Portable ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Easy to Use ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Weather Resistance ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ What are the main features of these heavy-duty padlocks? Our 40mm padlocks feature a hardened metal shackle and tough locking mechanism, deterring unauthorised access and providing robust security. Can these padlocks be used outdoors? Yes, these heavy-duty padlocks are designed for outdoor use, ideal for securing sheds, fences, garages, and garden gates. How many padlocks and keys are included in the pack? The pack includes 2x 40mm padlocks, each with its own set of keys, providing reliable security for multiple applications. Are these padlocks suitable for securing toolboxes and gym lockers? Absolutely, our versatile padlocks can secure toolboxes, gym lockers, and various other items, ensuring your valuables are protected. What materials are these padlocks made from? These padlocks are crafted from stainless steel and hardened cast iron, making them weather resistant and durable for long-lasting use.
